templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $100. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@fabulyssboutique.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://instagram.com/fabulyssboutique and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/fabulyssboutique

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 3-7 business days or 2-3 weeks for custom orders, excluding weekends and holidays. All orders are shipped with USPS and once shipped, it will take 2-5 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: All our orders are shipped from Connecticut.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://fabulyssboutique.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@fabulyssboutique.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@fabulyssboutique.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Retroactive discount
templates.content: Unfortunately, we can't add discount codes to orders once they're already placed. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Some items can't be shipped to my address
templates.content:
I'm afraid that some of our products can't be shipped to certain locations. Our Stun Guns cannot be shipped to the following locations: Hawaii, Rhode Island, Illinois, Massachusetts, Michigan, Wisconsin, and internationally. 

Pepper spray cannot be shipped to the following locations: New York, Massachusetts, Washington D.C, Alaska, and internationally. Do you have one of these items in your cart?

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://fabulyssboutique.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to check if you can cancel or edit your order is to email us at support@fabulyssboutique.com. Our team is happy to help!
